input.background: Suppose you want to estimate \boldsymbol{\mu}_1-\boldsymbol{\mu}_2 with 95 \% confidence for a problem similar to the cholesterol illustrative example. You want your margin of error to be no greater than 0.25 \mathrm{mmol} / \mathrm{L}.
input.question: Now suppose that you can recruit only 20 individuals into group 1. How many individuals will you now need in group 2?

output.method: 达到指定概率所需的最小样本量
output.answer: n_2=\frac{n n_1}{2 n_1-n}=\frac{31 \cdot 20}{2 \cdot 20-31}=68.9. Round this up to 69.

margin_of_error.description: Desired maximum margin of error for the confidence interval

group_2_size.description: Number of individuals needed in group 2

meta_info.caption: Sample size requirement for a confidence interval for $\\mu_1-\\mu_2$
